_comments.note: This top-level '_comments' field is for humans only — it does not affect npm. Keep it if you want inline explanations inside package.json.

scripts.build: NestJS project compile karne ke liye (nest build).
scripts.format: Prettier se code format karne ke liye.
scripts.start: Nest server start karne ke liye (development/production default).
scripts.start:dev: Watch mode mein server chalane ke liye (development).
scripts.start:debug: Debugger ke saath Nest start karne ke liye.
scripts.start:prod: Compiled build ko node se run karne ke liye (production).
scripts.lint: ESLint chalakar code issues dhoondhna aur fix karna.
scripts.test:watch: Jest ko watch mode mein chalana (file change par re-run).
scripts.test:cov: Coverage report generate karne ke liye.
scripts.test:debug: Tests ko debug mode mein chalane ke liye.
scripts.test:e2e: End-to-end tests chalane ke liye alag jest config.
scripts.usage: In scripts ko run karne ke liye: npm run <script-name>

dependencies.@nestjs/core: Nest application core aur DI container.
dependencies.@nestjs/jwt: JWT token generation aur verification helpers.
dependencies.passport: Authentication middleware used by passport strategies.
dependencies.bcrypt: Password hashing library — passwords ko securely store karne ke liye.
dependencies.class-transformer: Plain objects aur class instances transform karne ke liye.
dependencies.typeorm: ORM for relational databases (agar aap SQL use kar rahe hain).
dependencies.mongoose: MongoDB ODM (agar aap MongoDB use kar rahe hain).
dependencies.rxjs: Reactive programming library — Nest internally use karta hai.
dependencies.typescript: TypeScript compiler (project dev-time dependency hona chahiye).
dependencies.note: Agar sirf ek DB use kar rahe hain toh TypeORM ya Mongoose mein se ek hata sakte hain. 'typescript' aur '@types/node' ko devDependencies mein move karna aam practice hai.

devDependencies.@nestjs/cli: Nest CLI — project generate aur management helpers.
devDependencies.@typescript-eslint/parser: Parser so ESLint TypeScript code samajh sake.
devDependencies.eslint-config-prettier: Disable ESLint rules conflicting with Prettier.
devDependencies.eslint-plugin-prettier: Run Prettier as an ESLint rule.
devDependencies.source-map-support: Better stack traces for transpiled TypeScript.
devDependencies.ts-loader: TypeScript loader for webpack (may be unused).
devDependencies.ts-node: Run TypeScript directly in Node (dev tooling).
devDependencies.tsconfig-paths: Resolve tsconfig path aliases at runtime (tests/dev).
